entry.title: PHIL philosopher scenario ready for XML, SKOS, and Collibra publication
entry.summary: Semantic review of logs as governed document evidence.

entry.title: GUAR guardian scenario published as risk triage update
entry.summary: Risk-oriented log assessment and operational alert publication.

entry.title: EXPL explorer scenario proposes new code values
entry.summary: Discovery workflow for candidate log and document classes.

entry.title: HEAL healer scenario restores malformed XML and feeds
entry.summary: Normalization and remediation workflow for SilkPage payloads.

entry.title: NETW networker scenario aligns crosswalks and hierarchies
entry.summary: Cross-system vocabulary fusion across Atom, RSS, SKOS, and Collibra.
